title: The Road to Elbaf Opens
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on World Government, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Five Elders, Vegapunk as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: The Holy Land of Mary Geoise

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What D'ya Meaaaa- Aaaan?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That Dimwit vegapunk can't be telling the truth!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is Akainu doing?! He still hasn't done anything about Kuma's escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Besides, the world sinking doesn't affect us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What is with these scraps?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You buffoon of a Chef! I ordered beef!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so terribly sorry, your worship!! Our stocks have dwindled...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why did you serve me fish?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is unheard of!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aaaa H!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Flop...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This food issue has gone too far!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I not only missed a meal yesterday. I wasn't allowed any snacks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: UNACEPTABLE! Treated Like a Common Street Rat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is there a famine!? Will we Starve?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We must sentence whoever's responsible to death!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, that's not enough! The negligent scum responsible should be tortured for their mismanagement!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The room of authority

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: GARLING!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing here???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: New orders...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...have been bestowed upon me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: New orders??? from whom?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What are you saying, darling?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tread lightly. You forget yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The vegapunk known as York...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: shall henceforth be under my purview...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...as I was just named the new defense science warrior God.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: DON'T TELL ME

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The world is heading for turmoil...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: An unprecedented level of rebellion is imminent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us work together to better the world...

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: ...My fellow elders!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
